summary: Enterprise AI standards are now vendored locally so the repo runs the shared runtime guardrails validator through the repo-owned workflow and bootstrap contract.
next_action: Implement redaction and sensitivity controls for persisted session output previews under the normalized build/test/run evidence contract.

discovered_issues.summary: The hosted macOS release workflow still cannot pass preflight because GitHub lacks signing and notarization secrets and this workstation still does not expose exportable release credential material.

next_steps: Add redaction and sensitivity controls for persisted output previews.
Upgrade snippets into structured runbooks with parameter input, preview, execution records, and retained results.
Preserve the blocked release-secret provisioning work until exportable signing and notarization material exists.
blockers: GitHub release secret provisioning is still blocked because the repository has no configured signing/notarization secrets and the current workstation state does not expose exportable certificate or notary credential material.
